title: NyannPreferences
description: ~/.claude/nyann/preferences.json — per-user nyann defaults collected during setup. schemaVersion 1 covers the core preferences; schemaVersion 2 adds git_identity, session_triage, guard_default_severity, and notifications.{sentinel, staleness_alerts}.

default_profile.description: Profile name to use when none specified. 'auto-detect' defers to stack detection.

branching_strategy.description: Preferred branching strategy. 'auto-detect' defers to recommend-branch.sh.

gh_integration.description: Whether to enable GitHub CLI integration (branch protection, PR helpers) when gh is available.

auto_sync_team_profiles.description: Automatically sync team profile sources during bootstrap when stale.

git_identity.description: Confirmed git identity (read from `git config` at setup time, user confirmed). Added in schemaVersion 2.

session_triage.description: Run lightweight drift check at session start. Added in schemaVersion 2.

guard_default_severity.description: Default severity floor for pre-action guards. 'advisory' warns + continues; 'confirm' prompts. Added in schemaVersion 2.

notifications.description: Per-channel notification toggles. Added in schemaVersion 2.

setup_completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when setup was last completed.
